title: UAL (UAL) Intrinsic Value — Gemini 3.1 DCF Analysis
description: United Airlines Holdings, Inc., through its subsidiaries, provides air transportation services in North America, Asia, Europe, Africa, the Pacific, the Middle East, and Latin America. It operates a vast mainline fleet and regional fleet, focusing on major domestic hubs and international connectivity.

assumptions.revenueGrowth: 4.8% - Projected average annual growth rate, reflecting normalizing demand after the post-pandemic surge and capacity constraints.
assumptions.terminalGrowthRate: 2.0% - Assumes long-term growth in line with general economic expansion, acknowledging the mature and cyclical nature of the industry.
assumptions.discountRate: 9.5% - Derived using CAPM, incorporating a beta of 1.25 to reflect the high cyclicality and operating leverage of the airline business.
